description.description: A general explanation about the source

domain.description: The domain name of the source which is extracted from the source URL

home_page_url.description: The home page URL of the source

id.description: The source id which is a unique value

links_in_count.description: The number of websites that link to the source

locations.description: The source locations which are tend to be the physical locations of the source, e.g. BBC headquarter is located in London.

logo_url.description: A URL which points to the source logo

scopes.description: The source scopes which is tend to be scope locations of the source, e.g. BBC scopes is international.

title.description: The title of the home page URL
